COMMENT: DMR IO Cache / HSF MSCOD Decoding
ARCHITECTURE_NOTE: Used for IOCACHE (Bank 17) via io_cache_decoder and HSF (Home Snoop Filter, Bank 13) via mem_decoder. IOCACHE errors share MSCOD encoding with LLC cache errors. HSF entries are specific to the snoop filter array.
NOTES: IOCACHE MSCOD keys: 1,7,8,9,10,17,18,19,33,40,41 (from HSILH_MSCOD_TABLES[IOCACHE]). HSF MSCOD keys: 2,34,35,36,49,50,64-69,72-75 (from HSILH_MSCOD_TABLES[HSF]). No key conflicts. Fallback to llc_params.json if key not found.
